PLTF AGREES TO STAY EXECUTION UNTIL OR UNLESS THERE IS A NON- APPEALABLE FINAL JDGMNT IN SC#265618, OR A RESOLUTION OF SUCH CONTESTED PROCEEDGS BY ENFORCEABLE SETTLEMENT.
